note: Historical entry-ritual comprehension queries used before implementing the now-accepted Task 4b (test/doc/ledger weavers). Every expected fact is anchored to a v15 decision. They remain evidence of the exact traps (D25 provenance source_ref, D31 independence) checked before implementation.

queries.query: Which source_ref does a command-inferred verified-by edge carry?
Which source_ref does an import-derived verified-by edge carry?
Does the ledger weaver reuse the doc-weaver's contract map?
Is the ledger weaver's contract-files iterator consumed and exhausted even when the doc-weaver is skipped and no clause edge is produced?
Does the test-weaver execute any package check/test command?
What must an obligation contain to emit obligation -> contract-clause discharges?
